'''Ceousa''' was a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who participated in the [[Battle of Almania]] in which he commanded the [[Calamari (starship)|''Calamari'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
